title: Onimai Mahiro and Mihari Inventory Animated
description: Animated Inventory Gui with Mahiro and Mihari
body:
## Onimai Animated Inventory Gui For Minecraft

This Resource Pack changes your inventory backround (+transparent gui elements)
Should correctly work for all versions above 1.9 (tested on 1.8.9, 1.9, 1.12.2, 1.20.2, 1.21.11)
Works on version 1.8.9 but with some gui mismatches

**Texture pack requires OPTIFINE for Forge or ANIMATICA for Fabric**  
Also make sure to turn on animations in graphic settings

Ignore the message "Made for an older or newer version of Minecraft" if there is

**Preview**

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ehfGzNW0/images/feb30e78a8a13c8e831d652810be19e2ec02ca32.gif)
